summary: Iteration 97 - Verified StripePaymentRequestButton wallet mock is now correctly wired into PortalGive.jsx on /portal/give as a member. End-to-end flow works: login → navigate → quick-amount-25 → wallet slot/button renders above give-submit-btn → click google-pay-button opens wallet-mock-sheet with correct details ($25.00, General Fund, VISA •••• 4242, Default) → auto-success → donation-success banner appears → sonner toast 'Thank you for your generous gift of $25!' → amount field cleared → giving history section reloads. The iteration 96 gap is fully closed.
action_items: LOW: Console has React hydration warnings: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>' and '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' originating from PortalLayout (line ~161). Not related to wallet flow but should be cleaned up in a future pass.
LOW: Cloudflare Insights beacon.min.js blocked by CSP — harmless but noisy in console.
LOW: Sheet label displays 'VISA' uppercase (card_brand raw) instead of 'Visa' — cosmetic only; spec text said 'Visa' but the brand is displayed as the Stripe-style VISA logo-style text, acceptable.
critical_code_review_comments: PortalGive.jsx: wallet slot correctly gated by `giveAmount >= 1 && !showPayment`, placed above give-submit-btn as specified. Clean integration.
onSuccess handler correctly forwards payload to handleSolomonPaySuccess, identical persistence path as card flow (confirmed in iter 96 to hit /api/solomonpay/process and return sp_txn_*).
Fund label builder handles frequency suffix appropriately.
'OR' divider between wallet and card submit button is a good UX touch.

success_rate.backend: n/a (mock token path validated visually; previously confirmed backend in iter 96)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on /portal/give (all 9 checkpoints of task spec verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Wallet mock is now wired in two places: (1) /portal/give via PortalGive.jsx's portal-give-wallet-slot (verified this iteration), and (2) /giving via DonationCheckout.jsx (verified iter 96). Useful selectors on /portal/give: quick-amount-25, portal-give-wallet-slot, google-pay-button (Chromium) / apple-pay-button (Safari), wallet-mock-badge ('Demo mode — no card will be charged'), wallet-mock-sheet, donation-success, give-submit-btn (card path). Auto-success transitions in ~2.5-3.5s. Member is directed to /portal after login; /giving redirects members back to /portal.
rca of the issue: N/A - iteration 96's reported gap has been resolved by main agent as expected.
